title: i want to be able to represent dependencies in the cards detailed and overview views
description: please use the built in dependencies system in bd (beads) to store those dependencies but the user should be able to manage this while creating or editing a ticket (blocked by, blocking x, etc.)

title: auto gen title
description:
i want to switch the ticket creation up so i just need to write the prompt itself and not need to come up with a title

the title should be auto generated if left empty

when we create a ticket the placeholder in the title should say it's auto generated 

(use the flow that we use to generate title for session to do this)

and we should focus on the prompt field by default not the title field

title: make double clicking on a tab again take us out of focus mode
description: and add a button on the top right of the tabs bar to leave focus mode when it's currently applied for a project

title: bead progressing in statuses
description: we should make the agents push tickets around in the statuses in the swimlanes we have. right now they all stay in todo which is wrong.

title: the top tabs bar of the settings modal and the list of sections need to look better when the screen is narrow

implement simpler version of linear's version of this feature

need to add image previews to the projects area (when i paste an image add it small)

when i click quit on  a session or on all session it just stays stuck on "Quitting" and doesn't kill them actually
